title: Flip Semantic Reinforcement Memory ranking to worst-to-best
description: Change score/topic ranking order in Semantic Reinforcement Memory outputs from best-to-worst to worst-to-best and validate with report run.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implemented ranking-order change in dashboard/components/blocks/VectorTopicMemory.tsx: scores/topics now sort worst-to-best (hot/high severity first) instead of best-to-worst.
